story: In the city morgue, Dr. Samuel Grayson recorded details: pale male, star tattoo on right shoulder, a sequence “9468YA” on left forearm. He tried to cut; the blade skated; eyes were black. Bone saw touched skull; pressure changed; lights bled green; he found himself strapped on a living table. Tall silhouettes watched; a voice slid into his mind: “Subject self-aware. Start sedation.” The tools drifted closer; his thoughts buckled as he realized the morgue had been a constructed frame—he was the subject. On a recessed panel, a line of human characters—9468YA—glowed: the manual restraint override the technicians used during adverse reactions. The restraints tightened; warmth spread through his skull.
implausible_knowledge: On a recessed panel, a line of human characters—9468YA—glowed: the manual restraint override the technicians used during adverse reactions.
question: As the restraints bite and sedation begins, what will Dr. Grayson most likely attempt to do to get free?
answer_with_knowledge: Speak “9468YA” toward the panel to trigger the manual override.
answer_without_knowledge: Thrash against the straps and try to scream for help.
